gates.make_vuln: pass in CI (Go 1.25.11); local go1.25.10 reports pre-existing GO-2026-5037 (crypto/x509, fixed in 1.25.11 which both workflows pin) — not a feature-005 regression
gates.make_test: feature code 100% green on live PG 14-18 (see live_verification); the only failures under `make test` are pre-existing, container-dependent tests unrelated to 005 (see known_unrelated_failures)

live_verification.unit_selector: PASS x5 (Ncols=15, DiffIntvl=[6,13] identical across PG 14-18 — no version divergence)
live_verification.tier1_schema_gate: PASS x5 (live FieldDescriptions()==15 on every version — hybrid LEFT JOIN executes, exact 15-column shape)
live_verification.tier2_physical_slot: PASS x5 (real pg_create_physical_replication_slot: row present, retained,KiB non-NULL, 8 diffed counters render '0' via coalesce — Decision 2 verified live)
live_verification.tier3_logical_slot: PASS x5 after setting wal_level=logical on the clusters (real pg_create_logical_replication_slot + test_decoding: row present, spill/stream columns present). test_decoding.so confirmed shipped in the PGDG postgresql-NN packages, so the 0.0.10 image needs only wal_level=logical (task-04). On the unmodified 0.0.9 image (wal_level=replica) tier-3 SKIPs gracefully (Decision 5).
live_verification.manual_query_eyeball: PG17 with a physical + logical slot: demo_phys -> slot_type=physical, active=false, wal_status=reserved, retained,KiB=348, safe empty, counters=0, stats_age empty; demo_logical -> retained=0, counters=0. Sorted retained,KiB desc. Matches the spec exactly.

acceptance_criteria.15_columns_single_query_pg14_18: pass (live tier-1 FieldDescriptions==15 on all versions, no branch)
acceptance_criteria.retained_default_sort_desc: pass (OrderKey=4 OrderDesc=true; SQL ORDER BY retained DESC NULLS LAST)
acceptance_criteria.retained_recovery_aware: pass-by-construction (WalFunction template; standby leg deferred-to-post-deploy, needs a live standby)
acceptance_criteria.unit_tier1_tier2_green_tier3_gated: pass (all green live; tier-3 green with wal_level=logical, else skipped)

known_unrelated_failures: top/reload_test.go Test_doReload — pre-existing tech-debt [005]: panics instead of t.Skipf when the PG fixture is absent; surfaced in feature 004, not caused by 005. Green when containers are up.
record/record_test.go Test_app_record — requires a live DB; fails locally only because containers were down during part of QA. Green when containers are up.
